title: What the jury will actually decide in the case of Elon Musk vs. Sam Altman
summary: The biggest tech court case of the year centers on contractual disputes between Elon Musk and Sam Altman/OpenAI over the nonprofit's governance and direction. The jury will decide key questions about OpenAI's structure and obligations.
content: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.

zh.title: 陪审团将在埃隆·马斯克诉山姆·奥尔特曼案中真正决定什么
zh.summary: 今年最大的科技诉讼案件围绕埃隆·马斯克与山姆·奥尔特曼/OpenAI之间关于非营利组织治理和方向的合同纠纷。陪审团将决定关于OpenAI结构和义务的关键问题。

title: Honda’s hybrid future starts with new Accord and RDX prototypes
summary: Honda revealed prototype hybrid versions of the Accord sedan and Acura RDX SUV, signaling a strategic shift away from aggressive EV targets. The company is reallocating resources toward hybrid models, scrapping its goal for 100 percent EV/fuel cell sales by 2040.
content:
Honda revealed prototypes of two new hybrid models, an Accord sedan and the Acura RDX SUV, during its annual business briefing this week, built on a platform that it says will begin launching next year. The RDX was announced earlier this year as Honda's first SUV to feature the next-gen version of its two-motor hybrid system. 
Honda also announced it's dropping the goal of having one-fifth of its sales be EVs by 2030, and for 100 percent of its sales to come from EVs and fuel cell vehicles by 2040. Honda now plans to "reallocate more development and production resources into hybrid models."
Honda is planning to launch 15 next-generation h …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 本田的混动未来从新款Accord和RDX原型车开始
zh.summary: 本田推出了Accord轿车和讴歌RDX SUV的混动原型版本，标志着战略转变，远离激进的电动车目标。该公司正在重新配置资源用于混动模型，放弃了到2040年实现100%电动/燃料电池销售的目标。

title: Closing time
summary: Closing arguments in the Musk v. Altman trial saw Musk's lawyer stumble through his presentation with factual errors, while OpenAI's lawyer methodically presented evidence in chronological order. The trial showcased significant weaknesses in Musk's legal claims as presented by his legal team.
content:
Today was closing arguments in the Musk v. Altman trial, and I almost feel bad writing about the unbelievable demolition derby I just witnessed. Steven Molo, Musk's lawyer, stumbled over his words. He at one point called Greg Brockman - a co-defendant - Greg Altman. He erroneously claimed that Musk wasn't asking for money and had to be corrected by the judge. He made it clear we've heard from many liars over the past few weeks, but offered little evidence for Musk's actual legal claims.
OpenAI's lawyer, Sarah Eddy, countered this by simply arranging the mountain of evidence that the company introduced in chronological order. She didn't spen …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 结案时刻
zh.summary: 在马斯克诉奥尔特曼案的结案陈词中，马斯克的律师在陈述中磕磕绊绊，充满事实错误，而OpenAI的律师则按时间顺序系统地陈述证据。该案件展现了马斯克法律团队所提出的法律主张中存在的重大缺陷。

title: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond got its first big discount
summary: Metroid Prime 4: Beyond is on sale for $39.99 at Best Buy, a $20 discount from its $59.99 standard price, with additional upgrade options for Switch 2 users. The open-world first-person shooter has become a standout title on Nintendo Switch hardware, though the franchise's departure from traditional entries remains divisive.
content:
The most graphically-impressive first-person shooter made for the Nintendo Switch is $20 off at Best Buy. Right now, you can buy the physical version of Metroid Prime 4: Beyond for $39.99 ($20 off). The game looks surprisingly good on the 2017 hardware, but runs way better on the Switch 2 with the additional $10 upgrade pack that unlocks hi-res textures, faster loading times, and Joy-Con mouse mode.
If you’re gaming on a Switch 2, getting the discounted game and the digital upgrade pack costs $50 versus its normal $70 price for the Switch 2 Edition version. Yeah, it’s a little confusing.
Metroid Prime 4: Beyond

Where to Buy:

 $59.99 $39.99 at Best Buy (Switch)

The latest Prime game is a departure from the previous entries, the last of which was released all the way back in 2007. Beyond features an open-world design with plenty of associated trappings. There are map markers, collectibles, and a slick motorcycle to take bounty hunter Samus Aran across the huge desert where Beyond’s story unfolds. I agree with our review by Andrew Webster that these new additions feel out of place in the franchise, but I still had a good time, and the campaign doesn’t overstay its welcome.

zh.title: 《银河系前哨4：超越》首次大幅降价
zh.summary: 《银河系前哨4：超越》在百思买降价至39.99美元，比标准价格59.99美元便宜20美元，Switch 2用户可获得额外升级选项。这款开放世界第一人称射击游戏已成为任天堂Switch硬件上的杰出作品，但该系列对传统作品的偏离仍然存在争议。

title: Men use "vocal fry" more than women, counter to stereotype
summary: A new study finds that men actually use vocal fry more often than women, contradicting popular stereotypes that associate the speech pattern with women. The research suggests bias around vocal fry is socially constructed rather than reflecting actual usage differences.
content: Study suggests "the bias is real but socially constructed, rather than grounded in how women actually sound."

zh.title: 男性使用"低沉嗓音"比女性更频繁，反驳刻板印象
zh.summary: 一项新研究发现男性实际上比女性更频繁使用低沉嗓音，这与将这种言语模式与女性联系在一起的普遍刻板印象相矛盾。该研究表明，关于低沉嗓音的偏见是社会构建的，而非反映实际使用差异。

title: Elon Musk’s SpaceXAI has been bleeding staff since its merger
summary: More than 50 employees have departed Elon Musk's newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising concerns about burnout, leadership instability, and retention challenges. The departures suggest potential issues with merger integration, talent poaching, or weakened financial incentives.
content: More than 50 employees have reportedly left Elon Musk’s newly merged SpaceXAI since February, raising questions about burnout, leadership changes, talent poaching, and whether liquidity events weakened retention incentives.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的SpaceXAI合并后员工流失严重
zh.summary: 自2月以来，埃隆·马斯克新合并的SpaceXAI已有超过50名员工离职，引发了对倦怠、领导力不稳定和人才留用挑战的关注。这些离职表明可能存在合并整合问题、人才流失或财务激励减弱。

title: Meta brings virtual writing to everyone with Meta Ray-Ban Display glasses
summary: Meta is expanding hand gesture-based virtual writing to all Meta Ray-Ban Display smart glasses users, enabling message composition in WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, and native messaging apps. The feature, powered by a neural wristband, was previously limited to early access but is now available universally.
content:
Meta is rolling out new features to its Meta Ray-Ban Display smart glasses, including bringing the ability to write messages just with hand gestures to all users. You'll be able to use the feature in WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram and with "native Android and iOS messaging," Meta says.
The feature, which relies on the Meta Ray-Ban Display's included neural wristband, was one of the most impressive features of the Meta Ray-Ban Display when it was first announced. However, it wasn't available at launch, but in January, Meta launched it in early access for WhatsApp and Messenger. 
Meta is bringing a few other upgrades to the Meta Ray-Ban Disp …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta 为所有人提供 Meta Ray-Ban Display 眼镜虚拟书写功能
zh.summary: Meta 正在向所有 Meta Ray-Ban Display 智能眼镜用户扩展基于手势的虚拟书写功能，使用户能够在 WhatsApp、Messenger、Instagram 和原生消息应用中撰写消息。这项由神经腕带驱动的功能之前仅限于早期访问用户，但现在已向所有用户普遍开放。

title: Fired hacker twins forget to end Teams recording, capture own crimes
summary: Fired hacker twins inadvertently captured evidence of their own crimes when they forgot to stop a Microsoft Teams recording, solving an investigation. The security oversight highlights how careless mistakes can lead to self-incrimination.
content: One little mystery—solved.

zh.title: 被解雇的黑客双胞胎忘记关闭 Teams 录制，自己录下犯罪证据
zh.summary: 被解雇的黑客双胞胎在忘记停止 Microsoft Teams 录制时，无意中捕获了自己犯罪的证据，从而破案。这个安全疏漏突出了粗心的错误如何导致自我陷害。

title: Behold, the Elon Musk jackass trophy
summary: During the Musk v. Altman trial, OpenAI employees presented a commemorative trophy inscribed "Never stop being a jackass" in honor of researcher Josh Achiam, referencing a tense exchange where Musk called Achiam a jackass years earlier. The trophy's courtroom appearance became a notable moment illustrating personal tensions underlying the lawsuit.
content:
Yesterday, in Musk v. Altman, before the jurors came in, Sam Altman's team passed up what looked - from a distance - like a little league trophy. It was not. Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers had the lawyers read the inscription aloud for the press: "Never stop being a jackass." It's a commemoration OpenAI employees bought for research scientist Josh Achiam, who testified yesterday.
How exactly did this come up in a trial about nonprofit contract law? Allegedly, when Elon Musk was leaving OpenAI, he talked about wanting to race ahead of Google. Achiam, who worked on AI safety, asked if that was really such a good idea. Musk called him a jackass. Years …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 看哪，Elon Musk 混蛋奖杯
zh.summary: 在 Musk 诉 Altman 的审判中，OpenAI 员工展示了一个纪念性奖杯，上面刻着"永远不要停止做混蛋"，以纪念研究员 Josh Achiam，这引用了多年前 Musk 称 Achiam 是混蛋的紧张交流。这个奖杯在法庭上的出现成为了一个值得注意的时刻，说明了诉讼背后的个人紧张关系。

title: OpenAI says Codex is coming to your phone
summary: OpenAI is bringing Codex, its AI tool for coding and app control, to mobile devices through the ChatGPT app. The move aims to provide users greater flexibility in managing workflows and accessing AI-powered development tools across devices.
content: The update gives users enhanced flexibility over how they can manage their workflows.

zh.title: OpenAI表示Codex即将登陆手机
zh.summary: OpenAI正在通过ChatGPT应用将其AI编码和应用控制工具Codex引入移动设备。此举旨在为用户提供更大的灵活性，以便在各种设备上管理工作流程并访问AI驱动的开发工具。

title: Leaked images reveal Xbox Elite 3 controller with mysterious new buttons
summary: Leaked regulatory images reveal Microsoft's upcoming Xbox Elite 3 controller with a refined design, interchangeable components, and two mysterious new scroll wheels at the bottom for potential input control. The successor to the Elite 2 appears to introduce new input methods particularly suited for games like Microsoft Flight Simulator.
content:
Hours after a smaller Xbox Cloud Gaming controller appeared online, Brazil's Anatel regulator has also accidentally published images of what appears to be Microsoft's upcoming Xbox Elite 3 controller. Tecnoblog has posted images that show the successor to the Elite 2 controller, with an interchangeable D-Pad, paddles, and two new mysterious buttons.
The Elite 3 controller design appears to be more refined this time, with the addition of two new scroll wheels at the bottom that could be related to controller adjustments or a new input method for games like Microsoft Flight Simulator.




The Elite 3 will also have a new pair button that …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露图片显示Xbox Elite 3手柄配置神秘新按钮
zh.summary: 泄露的监管图片显示微软即将推出的Xbox Elite 3控制器采用精致设计、可互换组件，以及底部两个神秘的新滚轮用于潜在的输入控制。Elite 2的继任者似乎引入了新的输入方法，特别适合《微软飞行模拟器》等游戏。

title: Lovable just backed a company that’s looking to bring vibe coding to hardware
summary: Atech, a hardware startup, raised $800,000 in pre-seed funding including backing from a16z's scout fund and Sequoia Scout Fund, with plans to bring "vibe coding" capabilities to hardware devices. The funding round demonstrates growing investor interest in AI-enhanced hardware development.
content: Hardware company Atech raised $800,000 in pre-seed funding, including from a16z’s scout fund, Sequoia Scout Fund, and Nordic Makers.

zh.title: Lovable刚刚投资支持一家致力于在硬件上实现直观编程的公司
zh.summary: 硬件初创公司Atech筹集了80万美元的种子前融资，包括a16z侦察基金和Sequoia侦察基金的支持，计划在硬件设备上推出"直观编程"功能。此融资轮展示了投资者对AI增强硬件开发的日益增长的兴趣。

title: Cerebras IPO makes billions for Benchmark but VC Eric Vishria almost didn’t take the meeting
summary: Cerebras' IPO generated substantial returns for Benchmark, though partner Eric Vishria nearly missed the opportunity after initially hesitating to take a meeting with the hardware startup. The story illustrates how non-traditional VC investments in hardware can yield significant long-term returns despite initial skepticism.
content: Benchmark almost never backs hardware startups. So Eric Vishria dragged his feet ten years ago before agreeing to hear Cerebras' pitch.

zh.title: Cerebras IPO为Benchmark创造数十亿美元收益，但风投Eric Vishria几乎没有参加会议
zh.summary: Cerebras的IPO为Benchmark带来了可观的回报，尽管合伙人Eric Vishria在最初犹豫是否与这家硬件初创公司见面后，几乎错过了这个机会。这个故事说明了非传统风险投资对硬件的投资如何能够带来可观的长期回报，尽管初期存在怀疑。

title: OpenAI’s Codex is now in the ChatGPT mobile app
summary: OpenAI is integrating Codex, its desktop AI tool for code writing and app automation, into the ChatGPT mobile app to compete with Anthropic's Claude Code. The expansion represents OpenAI's strategic push to consolidate features into a mobile "superapp" following recent cuts to other projects.
content:
OpenAI is going to let users access Codex, its desktop AI tool that can write code and use apps on your computer, from the ChatGPT app on your phone. 
Following the surge in popularity for Anthropic's Claude Code, OpenAI has been working quickly to try and catch up, including by cutting back on "side quests," shutting down projects like the Sora video-generation tool, and focusing on growing its enterprise business. The company's push included the recently released major update for Codex that lets it operate apps on macOS - a potentially major step as part of its ambitions to make a desktop "superapp."
Codex in the ChatGPT mobile app lets  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI的Codex现已整合到ChatGPT移动应用中
zh.summary: OpenAI正在将Codex（其用于代码编写和应用自动化的桌面AI工具）整合到ChatGPT移动应用中，以与Anthropic的Claude Code竞争。这一扩展代表了OpenAI战略性地将功能整合到移动"超级应用"中，这是在最近裁减其他项目后的举动。

title: What happens when AI starts building itself?
summary: Richard Socher is launching a $650 million startup focused on developing AI systems capable of researching and improving themselves indefinitely. The ambitious venture aims to prove such self-improving AI can deliver practical products despite widespread skepticism about the approach's feasibility.
content: Richard Socher's new $650 million startup wants to build an AI that can research and improve itself indefinitely — and he insists it will actually ship products.

zh.title: 当AI开始自我构建时会发生什么？
zh.summary: Richard Socher正在启动一个6.5亿美元的初创公司，致力于开发能够无限期地研究和改进自身的AI系统。这个雄心勃勃的企业旨在证明这样的自我改进AI能够提供实用产品，尽管对该方法的可行性存在广泛的怀疑。

title: Meta’s summer sale drops Ray-Ban’s new smart glasses to record-low prices
summary: Meta is holding a summer sale offering significant discounts on Ray-Ban smart glasses, with the original model dropping to $224.25 (down $74) and the Gen 2 reaching $322.25 (down $57) through May 26th. Both models provide hands-free photo and video capabilities, open-ear audio, and AI assistant features including real-time translation and landmark recognition.
content:
You can save over $50 on the latest pair of Ray-Ban Meta glasses, which offer improved video quality and battery life. | Photo: Photo by Colt Bradley / The Verge	

If you’ve been curious about Ray-Ban’s Meta smart glasses, right now they’re on sale in Meta’s biggest deal event outside Black Friday. As part of the company’s Summer Sale event, which runs through May 26th, the original model is on sale starting at $224.25 ($74 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and directly from Meta, matching its best price to date. The newer, second-gen glasses are also discounted, and you can grab a pair for $322.25 ($57 off), which is a new low price, at Amazon, Best Buy, and from Meta.
Ray-Ban Meta (Gen 1) smart glasses

Where to Buy:

 $299 $224.25 at Amazon
 $299 $224.25 at Best Buy
 $299.99 $224.99 at Meta


Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2

Where to Buy:

 $379 $322.15 at Amazon
 $379 $322.15 at Best Buy
 $379 $322.15 at Meta

No matter which model you buy, you’re getting largely the same core experience. As far as smart glasses go, both are pretty stylish and look like a normal pair of Ray-Bans. They also offer the same feature set, letting you snap hands-free 1080p photos and short videos as well as livestream straight to Instagram or Facebook. Both glasses also double as surprisingly capable open-ear headphones, with speaker quality that’s great for listening to music while letting you stay aware of your surroundings. You can also take calls through a five-mic array that does a good job of keeping your voice sounding clear.
You also get access to all of Meta’s AI assistant features. If you’re planning to travel this summer, for example, the assistant can translate supported languages like Spanish, French, and Italian in real time, and answer questions about landmarks you’re looking at. They can also come in handy in everyday life, helping you brainstorm recipes based on whatever ingredients you already have in your fridge, reminding you about upcoming appointments, scanning QR codes, and more.
Th

zh.title: Meta的夏季促销将Ray-Ban新款智能眼镜降至历史最低价
zh.summary: Meta正在举办夏季促销活动，对Ray-Ban智能眼镜提供大幅折扣，原款降至$224.25（下降$74），第二代达到$322.25（下降$57），促销持续至5月26日。两款产品都提供免提拍照和摄像功能、开放式音频和AI助手功能，包括实时翻译和地标识别。

title: Cell phone users can't stop incriminating themselves
summary: Smartphone users increasingly confide sensitive information to their devices, creating legal vulnerabilities. Law enforcement and prosecutors exploit this tendency, using phone content as key evidence in criminal investigations.
content: People confide almost everything to their phones.

zh.title: 手机用户无法停止自我证罪
zh.summary: 智能手机用户越来越多地向设备透露敏感信息，造成法律漏洞。执法部门和检察官利用这一倾向，在刑事调查中使用手机内容作为关键证据。

title: Energy supplier abandons Lake Tahoe residents to serve data centers
summary: A Lake Tahoe area energy supplier is deprioritizing residential customers to serve nearby data centers, forcing the town's 49,000 residents to compete for power with resource-hungry computing facilities. This reflects a broader shift in energy allocation as tech infrastructure demands increasingly outpace consumer needs.
content: Town’s 49,000 California residents compete with Nevada data centers for energy.

zh.title: 能源供应商放弃太浩湖居民以服务数据中心
zh.summary: 太浩湖地区的一家能源供应商正在搁置住宅客户优先级以服务附近的数据中心，迫使该城镇的49,000名居民与资源密集型计算设施争夺电力。这反映了能源配置的更广泛转变，即科技基础设施需求越来越超过消费者需求。

title: OpenAI is reportedly preparing legal action against Apple; it wouldn’t be the first partner to feel burned
summary: OpenAI is exploring legal action against Apple over a failed ChatGPT integration that did not deliver expected subscriber growth and visibility on iOS devices. This marks another instance of tension between OpenAI and major tech partners.
content: OpenAI is so frustrated with Apple over a ChatGPT integration that failed to deliver the subscribers and prominence it expected that the company is now actively exploring legal action against the iPhone maker.

zh.title: 据报道，OpenAI准备对苹果采取法律行动；这不是第一个感受到伤害的合作伙伴
zh.summary: OpenAI正在探索对苹果的法律诉讼，因为ChatGPT集成失败，未能为iOS设备带来预期的用户增长和曝光度。这标志着OpenAI与主要科技合作伙伴之间又一次紧张关系。

title: Clawdmeter turns your Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard
summary: Clawdmeter, a new open source tool, converts Claude Code usage statistics into a compact desktop dashboard for developers. The tool targets power users seeking to track and optimize their AI-assisted coding activities.
content: A new open source gadget called Clawdmeter turns Claude Code usage stats into a tiny desktop dashboard for AI coding power users.

zh.title: Clawdmeter将您的Claude Code使用统计转化为一个小型桌面仪表板
zh.summary: Clawdmeter是一款新的开源工具，可将Claude Code的使用统计数据转换为开发者用的紧凑桌面仪表板。该工具面向寻求追踪和优化其AI辅助编码活动的高级用户。

title: Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses
summary: Microsoft is scaling back its Claude Code rollout after initially granting thousands of developers access to Anthropic's AI coding tool, which proved unexpectedly popular over the past six months. The company plans to redirect most users to its own Copilot CLI alternative instead.
content:
Microsoft first started opening up access to Claude Code in December, inviting thousands of its own developers to use Anthropic's AI coding tool daily. It was part of an effort to get project managers, designers, and other employees to experiment with coding for the first time, and sources tell me that Claude Code has proved very popular inside Microsoft over the past six months. Perhaps a little too popular, as Microsoft is now preparing to walk back its Claude Code push.
I understand that Microsoft is planning to remove most of its Claude Code licenses and push many of its developers to use Copilot CLI instead. While Claude Code has been  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软开始取消Claude Code许可证
zh.summary: 微软在初期向数千名开发者授予访问Anthropic AI编码工具Claude Code的权限后，开始缩减其推广，该工具在过去六个月中出乎意料地受欢迎。该公司计划改为将大多数用户转向其自己的Copilot CLI替代品。

title: Linux devs are fighting the new age-gated internet
summary: A Colorado bill requiring operating systems to collect and share user age data with app developers has prompted pushback from Linux companies like System76, who worry about technical feasibility and privacy implications. The legislation, designed primarily for iOS and Android, poses enforcement challenges for open-source platforms.
content:
In January, Colorado lawmakers introduced a proposal to make operating systems collect users' ages and pass them to app developers. The bill, SB26-051, had clearly been designed for commercial platforms like iOS and Android - one of numerous plans to age-gate the internet through users' devices. It was intended to provide information that would let developers disable age-inappropriate experiences for kids. But as it made the rounds online, Linux laptop maker Carl Richell read the proposal with dismay. 
Carl Richell is the founder and CEO of Denver-based System76, which also develops the Pop!_OS Linux distribution. The law, he realized, woul …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Linux 开发者抵制年龄限制互联网
zh.summary: 科罗拉多州一项要求操作系统收集并与应用开发者共享用户年龄数据的法案遭到 System76 等 Linux 公司的反对，他们对技术可行性和隐私影响感到担忧。这项主要针对 iOS 和 Android 的立法对开源平台的执行造成了困难。

title: YouTube viewers watch 2 billion hours of Shorts on TVs each month
summary: YouTube Shorts are gaining unexpected traction on television, with viewers consuming 2 billion hours monthly on TV devices despite the format's mobile-first design. This trend challenges assumptions about short-form video consumption and suggests YouTube's vertical content strategy is adaptable across screens.
content: Short-form video is built for mobile, so it may seem counterintuitive, but it's true: YouTube Shorts are becoming quite popular on the big screen.

zh.title: YouTube 用户每月在电视上观看 20 亿小时短视频
zh.summary: YouTube Shorts 在电视上获得了出乎意料的关注，观众每月在电视设备上观看 20 亿小时，这与该格式的移动优先设计相悖。这一趋势颠覆了人们对短视频消费的传统认知，表明 YouTube 的竖屏内容策略可跨屏适配。

title: Over a year later, AMD is bringing improved FSR 4 upscaling to its older GPUs
summary: AMD is extending its FSR 4.1 upscaling technology to older RDNA2 and RDNA3 GPUs, though performance gains may be smaller than on newer hardware. This move expands access to AMD's latest graphical improvements across a broader range of graphics cards.
content: FSR 4.1 running on RDNA3 or RDNA2 GPUs may take a bigger performance hit.

zh.title: 一年多后，AMD 为旧版 GPU 推出改进的 FSR 4 升级缩放技术
zh.summary: AMD 正在将其 FSR 4.1 升级缩放技术扩展到旧版 RDNA2 和 RDNA3 GPU，尽管性能提升可能不如新硬件显著。此举扩大了 AMD 最新图形改进的适用范围，惠及更多显卡型号。

title: Judge probes whether Musk settlement with Trump admin is tainted by corruption
summary: A judge is investigating whether a proposed settlement between Elon Musk and the Trump administration—reducing a $150 million lawsuit to a $1.5 million fine—amounts to corrupt favoritism. The inquiry examines potential preferential treatment given to Musk during the Trump administration.
content: Trump admin wants to let Musk pay $1.5M fine to settle $150 million Twitter suit.

zh.title: 法官调查马斯克与特朗普政府的和解是否被腐败玷污
zh.summary: 一名法官正在调查埃隆·马斯克与特朗普政府之间的拟议和解是否构成腐败偏袒，该和解将一项1.5亿美元的诉讼减少到150万美元的罚款。该调查审查了特朗普政府任期内对马斯克的潜在优惠待遇。

title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
summary: Security researchers have discovered a zero-day vulnerability that completely bypasses Windows 11's default BitLocker encryption protections. Microsoft is investigating the exploit, though details on the attack method remain unclear.
content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.

zh.title: 零日漏洞完全破坏Windows 11默认BitLocker保护
zh.summary: 安全研究人员发现了一个零日漏洞，该漏洞完全绕过了Windows 11的默认BitLocker加密保护。微软正在调查该漏洞，但有关攻击方法的细节仍不清楚。

title: Use this map to find the data centers in your backyard
summary: An interactive map created by Isabelle Reksopuro tracks data center construction and AI policy developments, helping residents understand the scale and location of Google's infrastructure expansion. The tool addresses misinformation about data centers as communities question the environmental and land-use implications of AI infrastructure projects.
content:
An interactive map tracking data center construction and AI policy, built by Isabelle Reksopuro.	

When Oregon resident Isabelle Reksopuro heard Google was gobbling up public land to fuel its data centers in her home state, she didn't initially know what to believe. "There's a lot of misinformation about data centers," she said. "Google has denied taking that land." 
Technically, she explains, The Dalles, a city near the Washington state border, sought to reclaim that land, "and Google is just a big, unnamed power user." The city had in fact asked for ownership of a 150-acre portion of Mount Hood National Forest, claiming it needs access to Mount Hood's watershed to meet municipal needs as its population - 16,010 as of the 2020 census -  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 用这张地图查找你家后院的数据中心
zh.summary: 由伊莎贝尔·雷克索普罗创建的互动地图追踪数据中心建设和人工智能政策发展,帮助居民了解谷歌基础设施扩张的规模和位置。该工具解决了关于数据中心的错误信息,因为社区对人工智能基础设施项目的环保和土地使用影响提出了疑问。

title: Your doctor’s AI notetaker may be making things up, Ontario audit finds
summary: An Ontario audit found that AI clinical notekeeping systems are generating fabricated information, including fake therapy referrals and incorrect prescriptions. The findings raise serious concerns about the reliability and safety of AI documentation tools in healthcare settings.
content: Made-up therapy referrals, incorrect prescriptions among the common mistakes.

zh.title: 医生的人工智能记录员可能在编造信息，安大略省审计发现
zh.summary: 安大略省审计发现，人工智能临床记录系统正在生成虚假信息，包括虚假的治疗转诊和不正确的处方。这些发现引起了人们对医疗保健设置中人工智能文档工具的可靠性和安全性的严重关注。

title: Vaporware or not? Aptera assembles its first five validation models.
summary: Aptera, a three-wheel, two-seat electric vehicle in development since 2006, has assembled its first five validation models, suggesting the long-delayed project may finally be moving toward production. This milestone addresses years of skepticism about whether the vehicle was vaporware or a viable commercial product.
content: The three-wheel, two-seat EV has been in development since 2006.

zh.title: 是蒸汽软件还是真实产品?Aptera组装了首批五个验证模型
zh.summary: Aptera是一款自2006年以来一直在开发的三轮两座电动汽车,已组装了首批五个验证模型,表明这个长期延迟的项目最终可能正在向生产阶段迈进。这一里程碑消解了多年来关于该车是否为蒸汽软件或可行商业产品的怀疑。

title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
summary: Cisco announced record revenue alongside 4,000 layoffs, with the company's CFO characterizing the cuts as strategic restructuring rather than cost-cutting. The announcement highlights the disconnect between strong financial performance and significant workforce reductions in tech.
content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven resutrcture," CFO says.

zh.title: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000人裁员
zh.summary: 思科宣布了创纪录的收入和4000人裁员,公司首席财务官将裁员描述为战略性重组而非成本削减。该公告突出了强劲的财务表现与科技行业大幅员工减少之间的脱节。

title: Cerebras raises $5.5B, then stock pops $108%, in the first huge tech IPO of 2026
summary: AI chip maker Cerebras raised $5.5 billion in its IPO, with shares jumping 108% on the first day of trading—marking 2026's first major tech IPO. The massive market enthusiasm signals renewed investor confidence in AI infrastructure companies after a period of market uncertainty.
content: A year ago, it looked like this day would never happen for Cerebras.

zh.title: Cerebras融资55亿美元首日股价暴涨108%，成为2026年首个重大科技IPO
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商Cerebras在首次公开募股中融资55亿美元，首个交易日股价上涨108%，标志着2026年首个重大科技IPO。巨大的市场热情表明，经历一段市场不确定性后，投资者对AI基础设施公司重燃信心。

title: OpenAI says hackers stole some data after latest code security issue
summary: OpenAI disclosed a code security breach in which hackers stole some data, though the company stated the incident was limited to employee devices and did not compromise user data, production systems, or intellectual property. The disclosure comes amid heightened scrutiny of AI companies' security practices.
content: OpenAI said the damage was limited to the employees’ devices, and did not affect user data nor its production systems, and none of its intellectual property was stolen.

zh.title: OpenAI称黑客在最新代码安全漏洞事件中窃取了部分数据
zh.summary: OpenAI披露了一起代码安全漏洞事件，黑客在其中窃取了部分数据。该公司表示，此次事件仅涉及员工设备，未对用户数据、生产系统或知识产权造成影响。这一披露发生在人工智能公司的安全实践受到广泛审查的背景下。

title: Subnautica 2 is having a huge launch on Steam
summary: Subnautica 2 achieved massive success in its Steam launch, selling over one million copies and reaching 460,000 concurrent players within hours, making it the fourth-most played game on the platform. The underwater survival sequel's performance demonstrates strong demand for the franchise across PC and console platforms.
content:
Subnautica 2, the new underwater survival game from Unknown Worlds, took less than an hour to rocket up Steam's charts. The game has already sold more than one million copies, according to a press release, and as of this writing, Steam's charts show that Subnautica 2 is currently the fourth-most played game on the platform with more than 460,000 concurrent players. The only titles with more concurrent players right now are perennial heavy hitters Counter-Strike 2, Dota 2, and PUBG: Battlegrounds.
It's also worth noting that Steam's Subnautica 2 player count doesn't include players on the Epic Games Store or on Xbox, where the game is also n …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《深海迷航2》在Steam上迎来大热
zh.summary: 《深海迷航2》在Steam上取得巨大成功，在数小时内销售超过100万份，并达到46万并发玩家，成为该平台上第四大最受欢迎的游戏。这款水下生存续作的成绩表明该系列在PC和游戏机平台上的需求强劲。

title: Leaked images show Microsoft’s new Xbox Cloud Gaming controller
summary: Leaked regulatory filings revealed Microsoft's upcoming Xbox Cloud Gaming controller, a smaller device designed with direct Wi-Fi connectivity for seamless cloud gaming. The controller features 2.4GHz and 5GHz Wi-Fi, Bluetooth 5.3, and USB-C, streamlining the cloud gaming experience.
content:
I revealed earlier this year that Microsoft was working on a new Xbox controller that includes Wi-Fi to connect direct to Xbox Cloud Gaming servers. It now looks like that controller has leaked, thanks to some new images from Brazil's Anatel regulator. 
Tecnoblog published the images today, showing a new, smaller Xbox controller that looks similar to third-party options from 8BitDo and HyperX. The controller is made by Microsoft and includes 2.4GHz and 5GHz Wi-Fi connectivity, Bluetooth 5.3, and a USB-C port. There's also what appears to be some kind of pairing button at the top of the controller, as well as a D-Pad, bumpers, and triggers. 
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露图片显示微软新款Xbox云游戏控制器
zh.summary: 监管文件泄露显示微软即将推出的Xbox云游戏控制器，这是一款较小的设备，设计用于直接Wi-Fi连接，实现无缝云游戏。该控制器具有2.4GHz和5GHz Wi-Fi、蓝牙5.3和USB-C接口，简化了云游戏体验。

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are in a high-stakes trial over OpenAI's direction, with Musk accusing the company of abandoning its nonprofit mission for profit while Altman defends the organization's independence. The case could reshape AI governance and corporate structure in the industry.
content:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
Elon Musk, his financial manager and Neuralink CEO, Jared Birchall, and OpenAI cofounder Greg Brockman have already testified before the jury. Shivon Zilis, a former OpenAI board member who shares four children with Musk, took the stand last week, and the courtroom also watched former OpenAI CTO Mura Murati’s videotaped deposition.
For the trial’s third week, Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella appeared on Monday, followed by OpenAI cofounder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever. Altman took the stand on Tuesday to refute the Musk argument that he is a liar and a snake, and now on Thursday, May 14th, we will hear the closing arguments, available via an audio live stream on YouTube.
Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.
People to Know
Plaintiff
Elon Musk — plaintiff, OpenAI cofounder and now CEO of rival xAI
Steven Molo — lead counsel for the plaintiff
Jared Birchall — manager of Musk’s family office
Shivon Zilis — former OpenAI board member who shares multiple children with Musk
Defendant
Sam Altman — defendant, CEO of OpenAI 
William Savitt — lead counsel for the defendant
Greg Br

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克与萨姆·奥特曼OpenAI法庭之争的实时更新
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克和萨姆·奥特曼在关于OpenAI发展方向的高风险诉讼中，马斯克指控该公司放弃了其非营利性使命而追求利润，而奥特曼为该组织的独立性进行辩护。该案件可能重塑行业中的人工智能治理和公司结构。

title: Spotify to adopt Apple’s new video podcast tech, offering creators easier cross-platform distribution
summary: Spotify is adopting Apple's HLS video podcast technology to enable creators to distribute and monetize content across both platforms without workflow changes. This partnership simplifies cross-platform podcast distribution and expands monetization opportunities for content creators.
content: Spotify will let creators distribute and monetize video podcasts on Apple Podcasts using Apple’s HLS streaming technology, without changing their existing workflows.

zh.title: Spotify采用苹果新的视频播客技术，为创作者提供更便捷的跨平台分发
zh.summary: Spotify采用苹果的HLS视频播客技术，使创作者能够在两个平台上分发和创收内容，而无需改变工作流程。此合作简化了跨平台播客分发，并为内容创作者扩展了创收机会。

title: Netflix is building an AI animation studio
summary: Netflix is developing an internal AI animation studio called INKubator to produce short-form animated content, according to recent job postings seeking producers, engineers, and CG artists. The move signals the streamer's intent to leverage generative AI for in-house content creation.
content:
Netflix’s job listings indicate an generative AI-heavy animation studio is coming. | Image: The Verge	

This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week.
Netflix has been building a new internal studio called INKubator that aims to use AI to produce short-form animated content: The streamer is hiring for a wide variety of roles, including producers, software engineers, and CG artists to staff INKubator, according to a number of recently published job listings.
Netflix has yet to publicly announce its plans for INKubator, which job listings also sometimes refer to as INK. The company did not immediately respond to a request for c …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix正在建立AI动画工作室
zh.summary: Netflix正在开发一个名为INKubator的内部AI动画工作室，用于制作短视频动画内容。根据最近的招聘信息，公司正在招聘制作人、工程师和CG艺术家。这一举动表明该流媒体平台意图利用生成式AI进行内部内容创作。

title: Americans do not want AI data centers in their backyards
summary: A Gallup survey found that over 70 percent of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their communities, with data centers now less popular than nuclear power plants. The finding presents a significant challenge for AI companies seeking to expand infrastructure across the United States.
content:
Over 70 percent of Americans oppose AI data center construction in their area, according to a new Gallup survey. Just 7 percent said they were "strongly" in favor of new data centers. According to Gallup, data centers are so strongly disliked that Americans would prefer to live near a nuclear power plant than a data center - even at its peak, opposition to nuclear power plant construction topped out at 63 percent. 
Gallup's data is based on a March 2026 survey of 1,000 randomly selected American adults in all 50 US states and the District of Columbia, along with an April 2026 survey of 2,054 adults "who are members of the Gallup Panel." Amo …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国人不想在自家后院建AI数据中心
zh.summary: 盖洛普民调发现，超过70%的美国人反对在自己所在社区建立AI数据中心，数据中心现在甚至不如核电站受欢迎。这一发现对寻求在全美范围内扩展基础设施的AI公司构成了重大挑战。

title: Khosla Ventures is betting $10M on Ian Crosby, whose first startup, Bench, imploded
summary: Khosla Ventures invested $10 million in entrepreneur Ian Crosby's new startup Synthetic, an AI-powered bookkeeping service for other startups, despite his previous company Bench's failure. The bet reflects investor confidence in AI automation for business operations and financial management.
content: Crosby is building Synthetic, a fully autonomous AI bookkeeping service for other startups.

zh.title: Khosla风险投资向Ian Crosby下注1000万美元，他的第一家初创公司Bench已倒闭
zh.summary: Khosla风险投资向企业家Ian Crosby的新创业公司Synthetic投资了1000万美元，该公司为其他初创公司提供AI驱动的簿记服务，尽管他之前的公司Bench已经失败。这次投资反映了投资者对AI在商业运营和财务管理自动化方面的信心。

title: The Beats Solo 4 have returned to their best price of the year
summary: Beats Solo 4 wireless headphones are available at $129.95 across major retailers, matching the best price of the year with a $70 discount. The headphones offer lossless audio support, cross-platform compatibility with iOS and Android, and nearly two days of battery life.
content:
The Beats Solo 4 support lossless audio and work with both iOS and Android devices. | Image: The Verge	

If you want a pair of Apple-made wireless headphones that work just as well with Android as with iOS, the Beats Solo 4 are down to around $129.95 ($70 off) at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target. That matches the best price we’ve seen so far this year. While each retailer is offering discounts on the black, light pink, and blue color schemes, Target also has several additional discounted options, including gold.
Beats Solo 4

Where to Buy:

 $199.95 $129.95 at Amazon
 $199.95 $129.99 at Best Buy
 $199.95 $129.99 at Target

Unsurprisingly, the foldable wireless headphones deliver high-quality sound, thanks to support for lossless audio over the included USB-C or 3.5mm audio cable. Like other recent Beats products, the Solo 4 also support native software features in both Android and iOS, including compatibility with Apple’s Find My and Google’s Find Hub, making them easier to track down if they go missing. Android users also get conveniences like automatic device switching, though only iPhone owners can activate head-tracking spatial audio.
We’re big fans of the Beats Solo 4 for other reasons, too. They can last nearly two full days on a single charge, and once the battery runs out, you can keep listening in wired mode. It’s a shame they lack active noise cancellation, but their comfortable memory foam ear cups provide decent passive noise isolation in a pinch, helping block out some noise as you listen. 
Read our full Beats Solo 4 review.

zh.title: Beats Solo 4 已回到其今年最低价格
zh.summary: Beats Solo 4 无线耳机在主要零售商处以 129.95 美元的价格提供，与今年最低价格持平，享受 70 美元的折扣。这款耳机提供无损音频支持、iOS 和 Android 跨平台兼容性，以及近两天的电池续航。

title: How to turn off Instagram’s new Instants feature and retract photos you accidentally shared
summary: Instagram users are seeking ways to disable the new Instants feature after accidentally sharing images they didn't intend to send. The feature, which Meta positioned as a way to share real-life moments, has confused many users unfamiliar with its mechanics and sharing behavior.
content: While the Meta-owned social network billed Instants as a new format to share real-life moments as they’re happening, many users are looking for a way  to turn off the feature, especially those who have accidentally sent images to others, not fully understanding how the feature works.

zh.title: 如何关闭 Instagram 的新 Instants 功能以及撤回您意外分享的照片
zh.summary: Instagram 用户正在寻求关闭新的 Instants 功能的方法，因为他们不小心分享了不想发送的图像。这项功能由 Meta 定位为分享真实时刻的方式，但困惑了许多对其机制和分享行为不熟悉的用户。

title: Razer’s Blade 18 is getting a $500 price hike and a new Intel chip
summary: Razer unveiled its 2026 Blade 18 gaming laptop with Intel's new Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus processor, priced at $3,999.99—a $500 increase from the previous year's model. The upgrade features the same GPU lineup and an 18-inch display claimed to be 20 percent brighter than last year's version.
content:
Razer just announced a new Blade 18 gaming laptop with an Intel Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus chip. The flagship laptop is available now on Razer's site, starting at $3,999.99 with an Nvidia RTX 5070 Ti and configurable with up to an RTX 5090. That starting config is $500 more than the 2025 model with the same GPU, and it comes a year after the 2025 Blade 18 got a price increase before even going on sale.
The new Blade 18 seems very much like a chip bump from Intel Arrow Lake to Arrow Lake Refresh. It has the same GPU offerings as last year and once again a unique dual-mode 18-inch display. Razer claims the screen is 20 percent brighter this year …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Razer 的 Blade 18 即将涨价 500 美元并搭载新的英特尔芯片
zh.summary: Razer 推出了其 2026 年款 Blade 18 游戏笔记本电脑，搭载英特尔新的 Core Ultra 9 290HX Plus 处理器，价格为 3999.99 美元——比去年型号增加了 500 美元。这次升级保留了相同的 GPU 阵容和 18 英寸显示屏，据称亮度比去年型号提高了 20%。

title: A spyware investigator exposed Russian government hackers trying to hijack Signal accounts
summary: A spyware researcher turned the tables on Russian government hackers who attempted to compromise his Signal accounts, successfully exposing details of their espionage operations. The incident highlights tactics used by state-sponsored actors to target cybersecurity professionals.
content: A group of likely Russian government hackers tried to hack a security researcher who investigates spyware attacks. He was then able to turn the tables on the hackers and reveal details of their espionage campaign.

zh.title: 一名间谍软件调查员揭露了试图劫持Signal账户的俄罗斯政府黑客
zh.summary: 一名间谍软件研究员对试图攻击其Signal账户的俄罗斯政府黑客进行了反击，成功揭露了他们的间谍活动细节。此事件强调了国家赞助的行为体针对网络安全专业人员的战术。

title: Cisco cuts nearly 4,000 jobs to spend more on AI, reports ‘record quarterly revenue’
summary: Cisco is eliminating nearly 4,000 jobs to redirect resources toward artificial intelligence initiatives while reporting record quarterly revenue. The move represents another round of workforce reductions amid the company's strategic pivot to AI technology.
content: This is Cisco's latest layoff in recent years, while the company's chief executive touts record revenue and growth.

zh.title: 思科裁员近4000人以增加AI投入，报告创纪录的季度收入
zh.summary: 思科正在裁员近4000人，以将资源转向人工智能计划，同时报告创纪录的季度收入。此举代表了该公司战略转向人工智能技术过程中的又一轮裁员。

title: Wirestock raises $23M to supply creative multimodal data to AI labs
summary: Wirestock has raised $23 million to expand its business as a multimodal data provider for AI development, supplying datasets of images, videos, design assets, and 3D gaming content to AI labs. The funding supports the company's 2023 pivot from a content marketplace to a data infrastructure provider.
content: The company pivoted to being a data provider in 2023 and now supplies datasets of images, videos, design assets, and gaming and 3D content to AI labs.

zh.title: Wirestock融资2300万美元为AI实验室供应创意多模态数据
zh.summary: Wirestock融资2300万美元，以扩展其作为AI开发多模态数据供应商的业务，向AI实验室提供图像、视频、设计资产和3D游戏内容的数据集。这笔资金支持该公司从2023年内容市场向数据基础设施提供商的转变。

title: Two weeks left: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close May 27
summary: Startup Battlefield 200 is accepting applications through May 27, offering selected companies $100,000 in equity-free funding, VC access, and prominent TechCrunch coverage. The program provides visibility and resources for early-stage founders seeking global investor exposure.
content: Your shot at VC access, global visibility, TechCrunch coverage, and $100K equity-free funding is running out. Deadline to apply is May 27. Apply now.

zh.title: 仅剩两周：Startup Battlefield 200申请截止日期为5月27日
zh.summary: Startup Battlefield 200目前正接受截至5月27日的申请，为入选公司提供10万美元无股权融资、VC融资渠道和重要的TechCrunch报道。该项目为寻求全球投资者接触的早期创始人提供可见性和资源。

title: Forecasters predict wildfires, floods, severe heatwaves from incoming El Niño
summary: Meteorologists predict that an incoming El Niño pattern, combined with human-caused global warming, will trigger widespread wildfires, floods, and severe heatwaves across multiple regions. The convergence of ocean heat anomalies and elevated baseline temperatures creates conditions for intensified and deadly climate extremes.
content: Ocean heat plus human-caused global warming is a grim recipe for deadly climate extremes.

zh.title: 气象学家预测厄尔尼诺将引发野火、洪水和严重热浪
zh.summary: 气象学家预测，即将到来的厄尔尼诺模式结合人为引起的全球变暖，将在多个地区引发广泛的野火、洪水和严重热浪。海洋热异常和升高的基线温度的汇聚造就了加剧和致命的气候极端条件。

title: Motorola Razr Fold review: Fits neatly in your pocket but not your budget
summary: The Motorola Razr Fold offers practical features and a compact pocket-friendly design, though it carries the premium pricing typical of foldable smartphones. The device demonstrates strong functionality but raises accessibility concerns due to its high cost relative to traditional phones.
content: The Razr Fold has a lot going for it, but like all foldables, it's wildly expensive.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉Razr Fold评测：装得进口袋，装不进钱包
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉Razr Fold提供了实用的功能和紧凑的口袋友好设计，但采用了可折叠智能手机典型的高端定价。该设备展现了强大的功能，但由于相对于传统手机的高成本，引发了易用性问题。

title: Insta360’s new viewfinder turns the action cam into a retro shooter
summary: Insta360 has released a new optical viewfinder accessory for its Go 3S action camera, enabling it to function as a handheld shooter with a classic film camera aesthetic. The Retro Viewfinder costs $47.99 standalone or is bundled with the camera starting at $299.99, offering a more affordable alternative to the company's LCD dock. The magnetic attachment allows users to frame shots at chest level while maintaining the camera's compact, mountable form factor.
content:
There’s certainly some retro appeal to Insta360’s new action camera accessory.	

The pill-shaped Insta360 Go 3S 4K action camera launched in June 2024 as an updated version of the 2.7K Go 3 that debuted a year prior. While last year’s Go Ultra introduced a redesign with a larger sensor and higher frame rates, the Go 3S has stuck around as a smaller but still very capable alternative. To broaden its appeal, the action cam is now available with a new optical viewfinder accessory for framing shots when using it as a handheld camera, but you may be better off splurging on Insta360’s more expensive dock that adds an LCD screen.
The Retro Viewfinder accessory is available today through Insta360’s online store on its own for $47.99, or as part of a new Go 3S Retro Bundle starting at $299.99 that includes the 64GB version of the action cam. That’s cheaper than the $349.99 Standard Bundle that pairs the same version of the Go 3S with Insta360’s Action Pod dock.
Insta360 GO 3S Retro Bundle

Where to Buy:

 $299.99 at Insta360 (64GB)
 $319.99 at Insta360 (128GB)

As with most tiny action cameras, the Insta360 Go 3S lacks a screen of its own. You can connect it to a smartphone app to see live previews and adjust camera settings, but the Go 3S is designed to be mounted where you wouldn’t be able to see a screen (like atop a helmet) where it captures nearly all the action in front of you using a wide-angle lens.
The new Retro Viewfinder is an attempt to repurpose the action cam as a handheld shooter that lets you frame subjects like a classic camera. It works similar to the Insta360’s Action Pod where the Go 3S slots into the front of the accessory. There’s no spring-loaded latches to keep it securely attached, but a strong magnet kept the camera in place during a vigorous shake test.




Instead of holding the accessory up to your eye to frame shots, you hold it at chest level and look down into the viewfinder. The front panel of the Go 3S functions as your shutter button, snapp

zh.title: Insta360新光学取景器将运动相机变成复古相机
zh.summary: Insta360为其Go 3S运动相机推出了新的光学取景器配件，使其能够作为手持拍摄器材，具有经典胶片相机的美感。零售价格为47.99美元，或与相机捆绑销售起价299.99美元，提供了比LCD基座更经济实惠的选择。磁性附件允许用户在胸部高度取景，同时保持相机的紧凑、可安装形态。

title: I’m obsessed with Forza Horizon 6, and I’ve barely even raced
summary: Forza Horizon 6 excels as an open-world exploration game set in a sprawling fictional Japan, offering players as much freedom to explore and enjoy scenery as to engage in competitive racing. The game significantly improves upon previous entries through its combination of map design and environmental detail, allowing players to experience it at their own pace.
content:
For the last week, I've spent every evening unwinding by speeding through the Japanese countryside, blaring Babymetal as I take in the sights. Forza Horizon 6 is ostensibly a racing game, one in which you play an up-and-coming driver intent on making a name for themselves. But, like the rest of the series, it's also an open world, one in which you can spend as much - or, in my case, substantially more - time exploring as you do racing. And it's that element that's substantially improved in Horizon 6. It's a combination of structure and setting: The fictional take on Japan isn't just the largest map in a Horizon game, but it's also incredibly …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我迷上了《极限竞速6》，但几乎没有参加过比赛
zh.summary: 作为一款开放世界探险游戏，《极限竞速：地平线6》表现出色，背景设在一个广阔的虚构日本，为玩家提供了尽可能多的自由探索和欣赏风景的机会，就像参加竞争性比赛一样。该游戏通过地图设计和环境细节的完美结合，显著改进了以前的版本，使玩家能够按照自己的步调体验游戏。

title: Desperate Trump taps "Tim Apple," Jensen Huang, Elon Musk to attend Xi summit
summary: Trump is convening a summit with China's Xi Jinping and inviting major tech CEOs including Tim Cook, Jensen Huang, and Elon Musk to attend. The meeting may require Trump to reconsider his aggressive stance on semiconductor tariffs and Taiwan policy given the industry's stakes. This gathering signals potential shifts in U.S.-China tech relations and trade policy.
content: Xi meeting may force Trump to pivot on semiconductor tariffs and Taiwan.

zh.title: 处境困难的特朗普邀请"蒂姆·苹果"、黄仁勋和埃隆·马斯克参加与习近平的峰会
zh.summary: 特朗普正在与中国领导人习近平召开峰会，并邀请包括蒂姆·库克、黄仁勋和埃隆·马斯克在内的主要科技公司CEO参加。鉴于该行业的重要性，这次会议可能要求特朗普重新考虑其在半导体关税和台湾政策上的激进立场。这次聚会表明美中科技关系和贸易政策可能发生转变。

title: You can make an app for that
summary: Advances in AI are enabling non-programmers—including lawyers, doctors, and educators—to build custom applications without learning to code, fundamentally challenging the traditional dynamic where professional developers held exclusive power over software creation. This democratization of software development represents a significant shift in how applications are built and who can build them.
content:
The tyranny of software is almost over. Since the first computer programmers wrote the first computer programs, we, the users of that software, have been forced to live in the worlds those programs create. The features are the features. The design is the design. Want something else, something better? Learn to code, I guess.
Until now, the people making a given piece of software - mostly well-paid professional developers - have rarely been the same as the ones using it: lawyers, doctors, churches, schools, me. (Where they overlap most directly is with developer tools, which are often the best and most passionately designed software you'll  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 你也能开发应用了
zh.summary: 人工智能的进步使非程序员（包括律师、医生和教育工作者）能够在无需学习编码的情况下构建自定义应用程序，根本上改变了专业开发人员垄断软件创建的传统格局。软件开发的民主化代表了应用构建方式和构建者身份的重大转变。

title: Android’s latest AI feature predicts what you’ll do next
summary: Google is rolling out an AI-powered "contextual suggestions" feature on Android that learns user habits and location patterns to recommend actions, such as playing favorite playlists when arriving at the gym. The feature has expanded from beta to stable release on Pixel devices as part of Google's broader integration of machine learning into everyday phone tasks.
content:
The contextual suggestions feature has started appearing on some Pixel 10 series devices. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Google is rolling out a new AI-powered "contextual suggestions" feature to Android users that recommends actions based on your daily habits, Android Authority reports. The feature is designed to predict your next action based on your location and habits - such as allowing music streaming apps to suggest your usual playlist when you arrive at the gym for your regular workout.
Contextual suggestions were previously available in the Play Services beta, but now Google seems to have expanded it to the stable channel. While Google hasn't announced that the feature has officially launched, some reporters at Android Authority and 9to5Google are see …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Android最新AI功能预测你的下一步行动
zh.summary: 谷歌正在推出Android上一项由人工智能驱动的"上下文建议"功能，该功能可学习用户习惯和位置模式来推荐操作，例如到达健身房时播放收藏的播放列表。该功能已从Pixel设备上的测试版本扩展到稳定版本，是谷歌将机器学习更广泛地整合到日常手机任务中的一部分。

title: Windows Update will soon automatically roll back faulty drivers
summary: Microsoft is introducing "Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery," a Windows Update feature that automatically replaces faulty drivers with previously working versions without requiring manual intervention. This addresses a long-standing pain point where problematic driver updates forced users to manually rollback or wait for vendor fixes, improving Windows 11's overall update experience.
content:
Microsoft is on a mission to fix Windows 11, and part of that involves improving the often-frustrating Windows Update experience. While you'll soon be able to pause updates indefinitely, Microsoft is also adding a new feature that automatically rolls back problematic drivers that have been installed through Windows Update.
Microsoft has created a new "Cloud-Initiated Driver Recovery" feature that can replace a faulty driver installed on a PC with a previously working driver through Windows Update. Right now, Windows 11 users have to manually roll back a driver or hardware vendors have to publish a new one to work around any problems, but th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Windows Update将自动回滚故障驱动程序
zh.summary: 微软正在推出"云启动驱动程序恢复"功能，这是Windows Update的一项新功能，可自动将故障驱动程序替换为之前可用的版本，无需用户手动干预。这解决了长期存在的痛点，即有问题的驱动程序更新迫使用户手动回滚或等待厂商修复，改善了Windows 11的整体更新体验。

title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
summary: Campbell Brown, Meta's former news chief, highlights a disconnect between Silicon Valley's vision for AI and consumer concerns about it. The conversation about AI regulation and impact differs significantly between tech industry and public discussions. This gap underscores the challenge of building public trust in AI systems.
content: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."

zh.title: 谁决定AI向你说什么？Meta前新闻主管Campbell Brown有想法
zh.summary: Meta前新闻主管Campbell Brown强调了硅谷对AI的愿景与消费者关切之间的脱节。关于AI监管和影响的对话在科技行业和公众讨论之间存在显著差异。这种差距突显了建立公众对AI系统信任的挑战。

title: Clio’s $500M milestone arrives just as Anthropic ups the ante
summary: Legal tech startup Clio has achieved $500 million in annual recurring revenue, reflecting strong market adoption in the legal AI sector. The milestone comes as Anthropic expands its enterprise presence, signaling growing demand for AI-powered legal solutions. This growth demonstrates the viability of AI applications in traditionally conservative professional services.
content: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

zh.title: Clio达到5亿美元里程碑之际，Anthropic加大赌注
zh.summary: 法律科技初创公司Clio实现了5亿美元的年经常性收入，反映了法律AI领域的强劲市场采用。这一里程碑的到来恰好赶上Anthropic扩大其企业业务，预示着对AI驱动法律解决方案的需求不断增长。这种增长证明了AI应用在传统上保守的专业服务中的可行性。
